src: A plush penguin toy with soft grey fur on the back and head, contrasting white belly, orange beak and feet, and small black eyes. The texture is fluffy and cuddly.
edit: A whimsical bird chick toy with speckled lavender and cream fur, aqua beak and webbed feet, and glittery emerald eyes. The texture is soft and magical.

per_image_non_shared_src.0: The object sits centrally on a smooth, dark tabletop, with a plain beige wall background.
per_image_non_shared_src.1: The object rests on a grey, textured office chair seat, surrounded by the mesh back of the chair.
per_image_non_shared_src.2: The object is placed between leaves of houseplants on a windowsill, with a garden view outside the window.
per_image_non_shared_src.3: The object is on the edge of a black cushioned surface, viewed from above and at an angle, against a white backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_src.4: The object is positioned on a wooden table next to a wall, in a shadowy, dimly lit room.
per_image_non_shared_src.5: The object is on a stone windowsill, against a window with a blurred cityscape outside in soft light.
per_image_non_shared_src.6: The object is tucked under a floral patterned white blanket, lying on a dark grey surface, facing forward.
per_image_non_shared_src.7: The object lies on a patterned bed cover, amidst geometric shapes in green and grey, with a dark cushion nearby.

per_image_non_shared_edit.0: The object sits centrally on a smooth, dark tabletop, against a vibrant spring background with floral patterns and pastel colors.
per_image_non_shared_edit.1: The object rests on a grey, textured office chair seat, surrounded by floral spring patterns and fresh green tints.
per_image_non_shared_edit.2: The object is placed between blossoms of spring plants on a windowsill, with budding trees visible outside the window.
per_image_non_shared_edit.3: The object is on the edge of a black cushioned surface, viewed from above and at an angle, against a spring-themed backdrop.
per_image_non_shared_edit.4: The object is positioned on a wooden table next to a wall, with soft springtime shadows and floral motifs.
per_image_non_shared_edit.5: The object is on a stone windowsill, against a window with blossoming trees visible outside in diffused spring light.
per_image_non_shared_edit.6: The object is tucked under a floral patterned white blanket, lying on a dark grey surface, amidst spring-themed textures.
per_image_non_shared_edit.7: The object lies on a patterned bed cover with spring-themed designs, surrounded by floral patterns and pastel colors.

prompt_shared: a two-colored toy of a bird chick
